'''Vivant''' served as [[Executive officer/Legends|first officer]]<ref name="who">{{InsiderCite|66|Who's Who: Imperial Grand Admirals}}</ref> and later [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Steadfast (Imperial-class)/Legends|''Steadfast'']].<ref name="ce" /> He was first officer under [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Afsheen Makati]] and served during an investigation into a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] base on [[Thila/Legends|Thila]]. The ''Steadfast'' was assisted by [[Supreme Prophet]] of the Dark Side [[Kadann]] during the investigation, and Kadann overheard Vivant mocking his extravagant attire. Kadann admonished Makati for his first officer's insubordination, embarrassing the Grand Admiral in front on his crew.<ref name="who" />

Vivant eventually became commander of the ''Steadfast'' at some point after Makati's [[Death/Legends|death]], and the ship was part of [[Carnor Jax]]'s battle fleet in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]]. Vivant brought the ''Steadfast'' to assist the ''[[Emperor's Revenge]]'' in bombarding the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces on [[Phaeda/Legends|Phaeda]]. However, Vivant was forced to surrender upon the arrival of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] and – more impressively – the ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]''.<ref name="ce" />

==Behind the scenes==
In an early draft of ''[[Who's Who: Imperial Grand Admirals]]'' originally set to be published in ''[[Star Wars Gamer]]'', Vivant is named as the ''Steadfast''{{'s}} [[Executive officer/Legends|first officer]] during the ship's time under [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Afsheen Makati]]. However, ''Gamer'' was canceled and the article was redrafted to appear in ''[[Star Wars Insider]]''. In the final draft, Vivant is not referred to by name, but mention of the ship's first officer and the events which occurred in the earlier draft still, albeit with less detail.<ref name="DD">"[[Dirty Dozen: The Imperial Grand Admirals]]"</ref><ref name="Blog">{{Blog|danwallace|16|Grand Admirals: What Have They Got in their Pocketsses?}}</ref>
